item.title: #TrumpCancellation
item.description: Have a streaming subscription or membership to cancel? When they ask you the reason, it's this: Trump. New trend for subscription cancellation feedback on what reasons are you canceling is #TrumpCancellation Trump is purposely messing up the US economy. January 2024, Trump claimed the stock market gains were because of his expected management as future president. Trump on May 1st 2025 claims it is all Biden's fault: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/trump-says-bidens-economy-businesses-205516007.html Trump wants the middle class to suffer and be scrambling.
item.dc:creator: hellospacemonkey

item.title: Young Anakin Skywalker is getting better <3
item.description: Jake Lloyd says he's finally feeling 'pretty good' after an 18-month stint in rehab to manage his schizophrenia! He's still a huge Star Wars fan, just beat 'The Force Unleashed', and plans to binge some of the newer projects for Star Wars Day. (via: Clayton_Sandell)
item.dc:creator: Ilovetomakestuffup

item.title: Now I want a fox
item.description: Kiki & Luna By Kiki the fox on IG.
item.dc:creator: Fulustreka

item.title: Great SUCCESS!
item.description:
I can't believe I did it.
Could not have done this alone. Thank you to everyone who ever showed kindness to someone you did not know. You have no idea what it can mean or how it can give someone belief in themselves. Edit: Wow! Did not expect to wake up to so much positivity and kindness! Thank you so much to everyone for helping me feel proud about this achievement! I got my degree in Criminal Justice. I am planning on going to law school in the future to focus on immigration law. I truly could not have done anything without the help and support I received from countless people who believed in me before I could believe in myself. I failed over and over again. It wasn't always easy, but here I am after trying so hard. I just hope that whoever reads this knows that you are worth it, you can do hard things, and that I believe in you. I'm so proud of you for getting up every day and trying to do your best. You make such a difference in the world with every small action. Keep going.
item.dc:creator: halefire

item.title: Attended my first protest today!
item.description: I live in a VERY conservative and highly racist area. So our numbers are small, but we stood loud and proud today!

item.title: No vaccines for you
item.description:
Vaccine soap box time. I keep telling myself I shouldn’t be surprised by what RFK Jr’s brainworm is up to and then he goes and pulls some new horrifying move. In today’s edition of “what fresh hell” RFK Jr is going to be requiring that all new vaccines, including updated versions of existing vaccines like COVID vaccines, be tested against placeboes.
I do this for a living. I do this for a goddamn living - manage vaccine research trials for brand new and updated vaccines for a whole host of infectious diseases, from flu to Zika, West Nile, and malaria, etc. Brand new vaccines, aka the OGs, are tested against placeboes. Because placebo vs actual vaccine is part of the statistical analysis and safety review that helps folks decide if it’s safe to continue additional phases of research/testing and for regulatory agencies determine if it’s safe to approve for use. Updated vaccines (like second generation COVID vaccines or any of the updated versions of the flu vaccine) are often tested using the currently approved vaccine as the control group instead of a placebo. Because we already have a vaccine that is a) approved, b) has a known side effect profile, and c) has years worth of its own research data to compare to when reviewing data for the updated vaccine. It is wildly unethical to use a saline placebo for studies of updated vaccines when there is an approved vaccine you can use as a control that you know will protect them against the infectious disease being studied. To force researchers to purposefully leave study participants unprotected is negligent and insane.
If RFK Jr wanted to gut vaccine research and increase vaccine hesitancy without having to deal with the fallout of cutting funding, this is a good way to do it. This man actively undermines healthcare professionals and researchers with every breath and is undoing the decades of hard work we have done to make sure that there are millions of data points to back up the safety and efficacy of vaccines. https://www.npr.org/sections/shots-health-news/2025/05/01/nx-s1-5383172/rfk-jr-placebo-vaccine-testing-studies
item.dc:creator: tinyvalkyrie

item.title: Give your post a title
item.description: I'm getting so much hate for a post. Im not a bot, I do post original content as well as meme dumps for over 10yrs. But if it makes you feel better, please use me as an outlet. I love you, my fellow Imgurians
